name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 26 Jun 2019
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": 6.58"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Minor Features","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Refresh Caches","bold":true},{"text":" button in your control panel will now load new CSS and JS assets, effectively clearing their cache as well."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue that prevented users from logging into the POS."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Resolved sales order payments that showed an "},{"text":"Uninitialised value","bold":true},{"text":" error so that this no longer occurs."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed a problem where Neto would try to update the payment status of orders that had been marked paid in eBay."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
